name: Roll the Dice

abilities.name: Deal Me In
abilities.text: When this model declares the Prepare action, it may gain a Brilliance token instead of other tokens.

abilities.name: Trump Cards
abilities.text: Once per activation. Before performing a duel, this model may add the suit of the top card of its discard pile to its duel total.

actions.name: Rig the Deck
actions.effects: Target gains a Brilliance token. This model may look at the top three cards of its own fate deck, may discard one, and then put any remaining cards back in any order.

extraction_notes: Faction not visible on card image
Trump Cards has 'Once per activation' timing restriction
Rig the Deck has (t)(c) cost icon in the tactical action table
